label: FAQ Accordion
summary: Instructions-only soft dossier for a frequently-asked-questions section using the native HTML <details>/<summary> pattern (zero JS, full keyboard accessibility, works without hydration). Emits schema.org FAQPage JSON-LD for rich SERP snippets. Renders 5-15 Q&A pairs grouped by optional category headings. The MIN_IDE-planned hard alternative is unchanged — this is the no-JS soft default that closes the existing capability-map gap for faq-section.
